summary: PR 2446 focused on mnsoundtest decomp/matching progress with related header signature updates and small formatting/include churn in neighboring mn menu files. The automated report recorded six new matches in main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest and five additional improvements, including large progress on fn_8024B2B0 and several mnsoundtest functions.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; adds/updates mnsoundtest logic, model descriptor, animation settings typing, text/object setup, sound input handling, and asset section loading.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnsoundtest.c adds SoundTestModelDesc, AnimLoopSettings vec_0..vec_5, fn_8024B2B0, fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnSoundTest_8024BEE0
issue_comment: decomp-dev report lists new matches and improvements for main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest

key_files.role: Header truthing for recovered mnsoundtest types and prototypes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: unk10 changed from UNK_T to HSD_Text*
raw_diff: fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 prototypes replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS

key_files.role: Neighboring menu source touched mostly for include ordering and formatting of existing animation-setting/pointer expressions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: debug.h include reordered; AnimLoopSettings initializers and HSD_JObj calls reformatted

key_files.role: Header formatting cleanup for padding array expressions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: x7_pad and xB_pad expressions spaced as 0x009 - 0x007 and 0x00C - 0x00B

key_files.role: Neighboring menu source touched for include ordering and formatting/layout changes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: debug.h include reordered; HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC, confirmed_selection assignment, label indentation, and HSD_JObjSetTranslateX formatting changed

what_changed.text: Added substantial mnsoundtest code, including fn_8024B2B0 input/update handling, object/text setup paths, transition/proc code, archive section loading, and sound/audio calls.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnsoundtest.c adds fn_8024B2B0 and later functions through mnSoundTest_8024BEE0

what_changed.text: Recovered or improved several mnsoundtest functions according to the automated match report: fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, fn_8024B7E4, mnSoundTest_8024AA70, plus .sdata2 and .bss new matches; fn_8024B2B0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnSoundTest_8024BEE0, .data, and mnSoundTest_8024A958 improved.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev issue_comment report for GALE01

what_changed.text: Changed mnsoundtest animation constants vec_0 through vec_5 from Vec3-shaped data to AnimLoopSettings and updated call sites to use start_frame/end_frame fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Vec3 vec_0..vec_5 changed to AnimLoopSettings
raw_diff: HSD_JObjReqAnimAll calls changed from vec_N.x/y to vec_N.start_frame/end_frame

what_changed.text: Updated mnsoundtest.h to replace unknown signatures with concrete prototypes and changed soundtest_user_data.unk10 from UNK_T to HSD_Text*.
Added static strings for mnsoundtest assert/report and archive section names and uses them in OSReport, __assert, and lbArchive_LoadSections.
Made mostly formatting/include-order changes in mnmainrule.c, mnmainrule.h, and mnstagesw.c while preserving existing logic shape in the excerpted hunks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnmainrule.c include/order and formatting hunks

smart_moves.text: When recovered function bodies proved interfaces, the PR updated the public header rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in place.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnsoundtest.h replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for fn_8024B8B4, fn_8024BAF0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnSoundTest_8024BEE0

smart_moves.text: Using AnimLoopSettings for start/end frame data made animation intent clearer at call sites than treating those records as generic Vec3 x/y fields.
The PR typed soundtest_user_data.unk10 as HSD_Text*, aligning the field with its actual HSD_SisLib text lifecycle use in mnsoundtest.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: user_data->unk10 assigned HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC result and freed with HSD_SisLib_803A5CC4

decomp_lessons.lesson: For menu animation tables, prefer a domain-specific struct with named start_frame/end_frame fields once call sites prove frame semantics; it improves readability and reduces misleading Vec3-style field access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: vec_0..vec_5 changed from Vec3 to AnimLoopSettings
raw_diff: HSD_JObjReqAnimAll uses vec_2.start_frame, vec_3.end_frame, vec_4.start_frame, vec_5.end_frame

decomp_lessons.lesson: After recovering mnsoundtest bodies, update the owning header signatures and field types instead of leaving unknown prototypes or UNK_T fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnsoundtest.h concrete prototypes and HSD_Text* unk10

decomp_lessons.lesson: Automated match reports are useful for scoping postmortem evidence, but they should be cited as report evidence rather than converted into unsupported author intent or human review conclusions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev bot report is the only comment with match metrics

naming_conventions.text: New local type name SoundTestModelDesc describes a group of joint/animjoint/matanim_joint/shapeanim_joint asset pointers for soundtest model loading.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct SoundTestModelDesc with joint, animjoint, matanim_joint, shapeanim_joint

naming_conventions.text: Recovered functions retain address-style names such as fn_8024B2B0, fn_8024B8B4, and mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 where semantic function names are not evidenced in the slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added function definitions and mnsoundtest.h prototypes

naming_conventions.text: Several locals use role names such as user_data, menu_data, inputs, state, sound_id, audio_id, and sound_kind in fn_8024B2B0, while some uncertain fields remain unk-prefixed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8024B2B0 local declarations and user_data->unk fields

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The PR uses narrow local-shape steering in mnsoundtest.c, including PAD_STACK(24), explicit unused/pad locals, and temporary pointer aliases such as new_var, apparently to preserve stack/register/codegen shape.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnSoundTest_8024A958 adds unused1/unused2/unused3 and new_var
raw_diff: mnSoundTest_8024AA70 adds pad1/pad2/pad5 and new_var

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The PR changes expression grouping and temporary variables in volume/text update code, for example combining temp_f1 multiplications and accessing vec_7.x/y directly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnSoundTest_8024A958 and mnSoundTest_8024AA70 vec_7 direct field access

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: The PR includes direct __assert plus OSReport in the recovered allocation failure path rather than macro-cleaning it in the shown slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 uses OSReport(mnSoundTest_803EF4F4) and __assert(mnSoundTest_803EF50C, 0x5F4U, mnSoundTest_803EF51C)

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Model asset loading is represented with a small descriptor struct and lbArchive_LoadSections arguments for joint, animjoint, matanim_joint, and shapeanim_joint.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Automated GALE01 report recorded matched code 66.38% (+0.04%, +1604 bytes) and matched data 38.72% (+0.01%, +96 bytes), with six new matches and five improvements in main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.

follow_up_queries: mnsoundtest AnimLoopSettings vec_0 vec_5 start_frame end_frame
mnsoundtest.h fn_8024B8B4 fn_8024BAF0 mnSoundTest_8024BCA0 mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 signatures
mnsoundtest PAD_STACK unused locals new_var matching tactic

evidence_refs: loaded_files: raw_diff truncated but targeted diff lookups recovered relevant mnsoundtest.h and mnstagesw.c hunks
text_corpus: only PR body is empty and only issue comment is decomp-dev bot report
notes: Evidence is strong for changed files, diff-visible code edits, and automated match metrics.
There is no human review feedback in the loaded slice, so reviewer intent and acceptance rationale are not inferred.
The raw diff excerpt was truncated in the prompt; local raw diff lookup was used only to recover exact hunks for mnsoundtest.h, mnstagesw.c, and later mnsoundtest functions.
No independent build, objdiff, or regression validation was run during intake; match status is cited only from the decomp-dev automated report.
Some code-shape tactics such as PAD_STACK, unused locals, and explicit static strings are observed, but the slice does not prove why each was necessary.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use domain animation-setting fields once frame semantics are proven
accepted_candidate_records.text: In mnsoundtest, replacing Vec3-shaped animation records with AnimLoopSettings and using start_frame/end_frame made call sites clearer while the automated report still showed matching progress.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Vec3 vec_0..vec_5 changed to AnimLoopSettings

accepted_candidate_records.title: Header signatures should follow recovered bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR replaced mnsoundtest UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations and an UNK_T text field with concrete signatures and HSD_Text* after body evidence existed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnsoundtest.h prototype and field updates

source_update_candidates.title: mnsoundtest user data text fields
source_update_candidates.text: src/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.h changed soundtest_user_data.unk10 from UNK_T to HSD_Text*, matching use as an HSD_SisLib text pointer in mnsoundtest.c.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-specific type fact for curator review; intake does not promote it directly.

source_update_candidates.title: mnsoundtest model asset descriptor layout
source_update_candidates.text: mnsoundtest.c introduced SoundTestModelDesc with joint, animjoint, matanim_joint, and shapeanim_joint pointers, loaded through lbArchive_LoadSections using MenMainConTs_Top asset names.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential source/path fact about mnsoundtest asset descriptor structure.

source_update_candidates.title: Review static string symbols in mnsoundtest for data ownership
source_update_candidates.text: The PR added static char symbols for report/assert text and archive section names. Curator may want to compare this with current literal/data ownership guidance before extracting any broader lesson.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static char string symbols added
source_update_candidates.reason: Observed PR evidence touches string/data ownership, but intake should not promote a general standard from this single historical slice.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no reviews or review comments are present in the loaded slice.
Do not generalize that PAD_STACK, unused locals, or dummy pad locals are accepted style; this PR only shows they were present alongside automated match progress.
Do not promote the added static string symbols as a recommended pattern without separate section ownership evidence and curator review.
Do not claim fn_8024B2B0 fully matched; the bot report only shows improvement to 77.42%.
